LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT MICHAEL UYENO, JORGE ORTEGA, AND VAOSA TAGALOA'S MOTION FOR SANCTIONS FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULES. APPEARANCES FOR DEFENDANTS/MOVING PARTIES & FOR PLAINTIFF/OPPOSING PARTY. ARGUED; $225.00 IS AWARDED TO DEFENDANT FOR THE COST OF ATTENDING THE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE DUE TO PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO NOTIFY ALL PARTIES. DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR SANCTIONS IS, OTHERWISE, DENIED.
